Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS

Title: Relates to service retirement of uniformed members of the New York city fire department pension fund
Summary: Removes the twenty-five year requirement for service retirement of certain uniformed members of the New York city fire department pension fund.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the retirement and social security law, in relation to service retirement of uniformed members of the New York city fire department pension fund
